title: Pyrenaria hirta

The classification of Pyrenaria hirta reflects its botanical characteristics and evolutionary history. intro: Pyrenaria hirta, commonly known as the Himalayan Pyrenaria, is a plant species belonging to the family Theaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities that can aid in the treatment of various diseases such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders. The bioactive constituents of Pyrenaria hirta include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects.
